SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Class Logger

java.lang.Object
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base.Logger
public class Logger extends Object
Centralize logging in this one class, so we can control it with configuration. Note that I'm not using a full logging framework -- something like Log4Jv2 would be about ten times larger than the whole of this program.
